title: English 12 Narrative, Memoir, Poetry, and Creative Writing Comments
description: English 12 starter comment bank for narrative, memoir, poetry, and creative writing aligned to grades 11-12 2023 NJSLS-ELA references. These materials are teacher-editable starter review materials aligned to common high school ELA writing tasks and 2023 NJSLS-ELA references. They are not official state curriculum, not district grading policy, and not automatic evaluation.

comments.label: Opening and Orientation strength
comments.short_text: Your opening and orientation orients the reader to situation, speaker, or conflict, which helps the reader understand....
comments.text: Your opening and orientation orients the reader to situation, speaker, or conflict, which helps the reader understand the work with precision and attention to complexity.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen opening and orientation?
comments.revision_action: Keep this opening and orientation move and apply it in another paragraph or section.

comments.label: Opening and Orientation developing
comments.short_text: Your opening and orientation is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you give the reader enough context to ....
comments.text: Your opening and orientation is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you give the reader enough context to enter the scene or idea.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen opening and orientation?
comments.revision_action: Give the reader enough context to enter the scene or idea.

comments.label: Opening and Orientation hard to follow
comments.short_text: The opening and orientation is difficult to follow right now.
comments.text: The opening and orientation is difficult to follow right now. Revisit this part first so the reader can understand the purpose of the writing.
comments.teacher_note: Use when opening and orientation is a major barrier to understanding.
comments.follow_up_prompt: Where should the student begin revising opening and orientation?
comments.revision_action: Rewrite the section that most affects opening and orientation before polishing sentences.

comments.label: Conventions next revision pass
comments.short_text: For the next revision pass, focus on conventions: Revise one moment so the explanation addresses significance, comple....
comments.text: For the next revision pass, focus on conventions: Revise one moment so the explanation addresses significance, complexity, or audience impact.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What single revision move would most improve conventions?
comments.revision_action: Make one focused pass for conventions and then reread the full piece.

module_details.notice: These materials are teacher-editable starter review materials aligned to common high school ELA writing tasks and 2023 NJSLS-ELA references. They are not official state curriculum, not district grading policy, and not automatic evaluation.
module_details.emphasis: precise and knowledgeable claims, significance, logical sequencing of claims and counterclaims, strongest relevant evidence, avoidance of fallacies, synthesis, sophisticated style, audience awareness, complexity, ambiguity, nuance, and independent revision.
